top3.sql:
WITH double_bonds_per_molecule AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
molecule_with_most_double_bonds AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM double_bonds_per_molecule
    ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label IS NOT NULL THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule_with_most_double_bonds mwd
JOIN molecule m ON mwd.m...

WITH double_bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
),
max_double_bond_molecule AS (
    SELECT 
        dbc.molecule_id
    FROM double_bond_counts dbc
    ORDER BY dbc.double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    m.label,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM molecule m2 
            WHERE m2.molecule_id = max_double_bond_molecule.mo...

final.sql:
WITH double_bonds_per_molecule AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
molecule_with_most_double_bonds AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM double_bonds_per_molecule
    ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label IS NOT NULL THEN 'yes' 
        ELSE 'no' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule_with_most_double_bonds mwd
JOIN molecule m ON mwd.m...
